normative_specification.candidate: 2.0 First Draft - Complete Pre-Testnet Design Blueprint
normative_specification.owner: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby - WeAll Protocol Maintainer
normative_specification.source_role: exact uploaded human-readable specification source retained by user decision

repository.same_commit_evidence_policy: PASS is forbidden unless the final implementation commit, UTC run timestamp, test-run ID, evidence digest, independent reviewer, activation gate, and activation receipt policy are all bound.
repository.closure_commit_binding_policy: two_commit_non_circular_attestation: commit implementation first, then bind that commit in an evidence-only finalization commit

closure_finalization.reviewer: Errol Jacob Jones Swaby (maintainer self-review; independent review deferred to launch authorization)
closure_finalization.authority_effect: none; public testnet and Mainnet remain disabled
closure_finalization.next_step: commit these provenance and derivative changes as an evidence-only finalization commit
